item.title: ScarfBench: Benchmarking AI Agents for Enterprise Java Framework Migration
item.description: Focus: Benchmark shares research or evaluation work on 'ScarfBench: Benchmarking AI Agents for Enterprise Java Framework Migration', with attention to metrics, findings and practical limits.

item.title: Featuring Every Eval Ever Results on Hugging Face Model Pages
item.description: Focus: Hugging Face has a new AI-related update around 'Featuring Every Eval Ever Results on Hugging Face Model Pages', relevant to product, industry or technical direction.

item.title: Claude Sonnet 5 now available on Vercel AI Gateway
item.description: Focus: Claude Sonnet 5 from Anthropic is now available on AI Gateway . Sonnet 5 improves on Sonnet 4.6 across coding and agentic work, reaching outcomes on many tasks that previously needed an Opus model, at Sonnet pricing. The model is more agentic and follows instructions more closely. Document pa

item.title: NVIDIA BioNeMo Agent Toolkit Brings Accelerated AI to Life Sciences Researchers in Claude Science
item.description: Focus: Life sciences has entered an era of computational scale, and for more than a decade, NVIDIA has built the full GPU-accelerated computing stack — spanning hardware, frameworks, libraries, models, microservices and domain-specific tools — to help researchers run more sophisticated workflows and

item.title: How NVIDIA’s Inference Software Stack Powers the Lowest Token Cost
item.description: Focus: As organizations move from AI pilots to production AI factories, infrastructure decisions have shifted from peak chip specifications to cost per token: how many useful tokens they can deliver per dollar, per watt and within required latency targets. Codesigned with NVIDIA GPUs, CPUs, networki

item.title: Why Specialization Is Inevitable
item.description: Focus: Hugging Face Blog has a new AI-related update around 'Why Specialization Is Inevitable', relevant to product, industry or technical direction.

item.title: How ChatGPT adoption has expanded
item.description: Focus: New OpenAI Signals data shows how ChatGPT adoption is growing globally, with users increasing usage, exploring more capabilities, and driving growth across regions and languages.

item.title: Introducing GeneBench-Pro
item.description: Focus: Introducing GeneBench-Pro, a new benchmark testing AI performance in genomics, biology, and scientific research using complex, real-world datasets.

item.title: Core dump epidemiology: fixing an 18-year-old bug
item.description: Focus: OpenAI engineers used large-scale core dump analysis to debug rare infrastructure crashes, uncovering both a hardware fault and a long-standing software bug.

item.title: Inside Genebench-Pro
item.description: Focus: OpenAI News has a new AI-related update around 'Inside Genebench-Pro', relevant to product, industry or technical direction.

item.title: Together AI at ICML 2026: frontier research across the full stack
item.description: Focus: Nine papers at ICML 2026 across the full stack. The research that becomes the Together platform. Find us at booth B714 in Seoul.

item.title: Sonnet 5 review: I ran 64 generations to find out if it's worth it
item.description: Focus: Lenny's Podcast is covered in a new interview or podcast. The core topic is 'Sonnet 5 review: I ran 64 generations to find out if it's worth it', useful for tracking executive views, AI strategy and product direction.

item.title: #498 – Anthony Kaldellis: Roman Empire, Byzantine Empire, Rise & Fall of Empires
item.description: Focus: Anthony Kaldellis is a historian of the Roman Empire and author of “The New Roman Empire”, a comprehensive history of the Byzantine Empire (Eastern Roman Empire). Thank you for listening ❤ Check out our sponsors: https://lexfridman.com/sponsors/ep498-sc See below for timestamps, transcript, a

item.title: Start building with Nano Banana 2 Lite and Gemini Omni Flash
item.description: Focus: Google DeepMind Podcast is covered in a new interview or podcast. The core topic is 'Start building with Nano Banana 2 Lite and Gemini Omni Flash', useful for tracking executive views, AI strategy and product direction.

item.title: Grant Sanderson – AI and the future of math
item.description: Focus: Dwarkesh Podcast is covered in a new interview or podcast. The core topic is 'Grant Sanderson – AI and the future of math', useful for tracking executive views, AI strategy and product direction.

item.title: How top PMs increase their leverage with AI
item.description: Focus: A framework for getting the most out of AI in your day-to-day-work

item.title: Heavy AI Adoption Linked To More Hiring, Not Layoffs, New Data Shows
item.description: Focus: A new Ramp study shows that the companies spending the most on AI are actually hiring more and not cutting the workforce.

item.title: How Jaiveer Singh Is Helping Robots — and Developers — Move Faster
item.description: Focus: When Jaiveer Singh talks about robots, he doesn’t begin with spectacle. He begins with infrastructure: the boards inside machines, the software that lets developers see through a robot’s cameras and the engineering required before a robot can leave a demo floor to do something useful. As a ro
